title: Contact — Rt Hon Robert Jenrick MP
meta_description: You can find the contact information for Robert Jenrick as the MP for Newark or Minister of State for the Home Office.
text_excerpt: Contact — Rt Hon Robert Jenrick MP 0 Skip to Content Rt Hon Robert Jenrick MP Home News in Newark Columns Speeches Contact me Open Menu Close Menu Rt Hon Robert Jenrick MP Home News in Newark Columns Speeches Contact me Open Menu Close Menu Home News in Newark Columns Speeches Contact me If you are writing to me you must be a constituent of mine ( check whether you’re a constituent ) in or around the Newark constituency.
